meta.description: PhD Student, AI/ML Engineer & Data Scientist specializing in Computer Vision

personal.name: Pujan Thapa
personal.tagline: Building intelligent systems at the frontier of research and engineering.
personal.bio: I'm a PhD student and AI Engineer at the University of Naples Federico II, specializing in Computer Vision for Autonomous Driving. With 5+ years of industry experience, I bridge cutting-edge research and production-grade AI systems — from satellite imagery analysis to political bias detection in media.

education.description: Specialized in Computer Vision and NLP. Thesis: "Computer Vision for Autonomous Driving" — developing real-time perception systems for autonomous vehicles using transformer-based architectures.

education.degree: B.S. in Computer Science & Information Technology
education.description: Foundational education in computer science, software engineering, algorithms, and data structures.

experience.description: Developed an end-to-end ML solution for the Omdena Challenge in 8 weeks — from satellite data collection via Google Earth Engine, through EDA and model development (supervised + unsupervised), to deployment on Streamlit Community Cloud.

Designed and deployed scalable Python-based ML, data engineering, and backend systems on AWS using Airflow, Docker, and CI/CD. Optimized data pipelines, re-architected legacy workflows, and improved test coverage with pytest, Selenium, and JMeter.

Built the Parentiv app backend using Python (FastAPI), Google Cloud Firestore, and App Engine. Integrated wearable device data (Apple Watch, Google Home) and implemented NLP preprocessing with NLTK and spaCy.

projects.title: CREA3
projects.subtitle: EU-Funded Justice Platform
projects.description: An EU-funded project with the University of Naples Federico II modernizing civil law procedures across Europe. Enables faster, fairer access to justice through electronic signatures, secure videoconferencing, automated evidence logging, and inclusive access for users with limited digital literacy.

projects.title: Plant Disease Detection
projects.subtitle: Agricultural AI System
projects.description: Plant disease detection system using image analysis. Combines YOLO for object detection with Non-negative Matrix Factorization (NMF) and Fuzzy Clustering for feature extraction and multi-class classification of leaf diseases.

projects.title: Political Leaning Detector
projects.subtitle: News Media Bias Analysis
projects.description: Web app classifying news articles as left-leaning, centrist, or right-leaning using fine-tuned BERT with LoRA for efficient parameter adaptation. Deployed with React JS, FastAPI, and Docker on Azure Container Apps for real-time predictions.

ongoing.title: Computer Vision for Autonomous Driving
ongoing.description: Research on perception systems for autonomous vehicles — real-time object detection, lane segmentation, and depth estimation. Exploring transformer-based architectures for multi-task learning in driving scenarios.
